svg.title: bellwether — Process / Data Flow
svg.desc: A run refreshes sources, parses them into the archive, checks freshness, then answers with citations and logs a graded call.
svg.metadata: uv run bellwether refresh -> uv run bellwether facts -> uv run bellwether fts -> uv run bellwether status -> ground_answer cites the release
